name: NEG001
input: I want Advantage Faux Wood in Black.
expected_output: Black is not an available color for Advantage Faux Wood. Available colors are Gravel, Greek Villa, Lily, Pecan Pie, Textured Lily, and Walnut Grove.
context: Available Colors: Gravel, Greek Villa, Lily, Pecan Pie, Textured Lily, Walnut Grove
retrieval_context: Black is not a valid selection

name: NEG002
input: Configure Advantage 2" Group 1 with a width of 20 inches and a height of 40 inches.
expected_output: The configuration is invalid because the width is below the minimum supported value of 24 inches.

name: NEG003
input: Configure Advantage 2" Group 1 with a width of 100 inches and a height of 50 inches.
expected_output: The configuration is invalid because the width exceeds the maximum supported value of 96 inches.

name: NEG004
input: Configure Advantage 2" Group 1 with a width of 40 inches and a height of 20 inches.
expected_output: The configuration is invalid because the height is below the minimum supported value of 30 inches.

name: NEG005
input: Configure Advantage 2" Group 1 with a width of 40 inches and a height of 90 inches.
expected_output: The configuration is invalid because the height exceeds the maximum supported value of 84 inches.

name: NEG006
input: I selected the color Black. Which Style Name will be applied automatically?
expected_output: No Style Name can be applied because Black is not a valid color for Advantage Faux Wood.
context: Automatic style rules apply only to supported colors

name: NEG007
input: I selected Textured Lily. Will the Style Name automatically change to Solids?
expected_output: No. Selecting Textured Lily automatically sets the Style Name to Premium, not Solids.

name: NEG008
input: I selected Gravel. Will the Style Name automatically change to Premium?
expected_output: No. Selecting Gravel automatically sets the Style Name to Solids.

name: NEG009
input: Can I enter a Valance Width without selecting Continuous Valance as Yes?
expected_output: No. Valance Width becomes available only when Continuous Valance is set to Yes.

name: NEG010
input: Can I configure Return Length without enabling Valance Returns?
expected_output: No. Return Length is available only after Valance Returns is set to Yes.
